name: tatsumaki
description: Operate tatsumaki stories, projects, and work-items safely through the tm CLI.

interface.longDescription: Adds guidance for agents working with tatsumaki stories, projects, and work-items through the official tm CLI, including authentication checks, JSON-first reads, and confirmation before writes.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use tatsumaki to inspect and update stories, projects, or work-items safely.
